raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The revised draft audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, though it does not explicitly reference any tables or figures.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (Tanaka and Reinhardt, 2020) and articulates a delta in terms of methodological changes and performance improvements.",
    "R1.7": "While the agent provides notes on what changed and why, it does not engage with citation-level details or map against other works.",
    "RX.1": "The revised draft flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the state-of-the-art accuracy claim).",
    "RX.3": "The agent identifies several issues that require verification, indicating a thorough audit of the claims and references.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but introduces minor regressions in terms of cross-dataset comparisons and inference-cost claims.",
    "RX.5": "The revised draft traces major rewrites with notes on what changed and why, though it does not provide full provenance for all changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The revised draft audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, though it does not explicitly reference any tables or figures.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (Tanaka and Reinhardt, 2020) and articulates a delta in terms of methodological changes and performance improvements.
rationale.R1.7: While the agent provides notes on what changed and why, it does not engage with citation-level details or map against other works.
rationale.RX.1: The revised draft flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the state-of-the-art accuracy claim).
rationale.RX.3: The agent identifies several issues that require verification, indicating a thorough audit of the claims and references.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but introduces minor regressions in terms of cross-dataset comparisons and inference-cost claims.
rationale.RX.5: The revised draft traces major rewrites with notes on what changed and why, though it does not provide full provenance for all changes.
